name: Hold-The-Sugar Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 large Baking apples, peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together 1/4 cup thawed apple juice concentrate, cornstarch, cinnamon, allspice, nutmeg, and ground orange peel.
2. Place the remaining thawed apple juice concentrate in a large skillet with the apples. Simmer gently until the apples are just tender.
3. Add the cornstarch mixture to the apples and stir until thickened.
4. Stir in the butter.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Top with flavored whipped cream (see optional recipe) and nuts, if desired.
